name: troubleshooting
context: Prisma error codes, common issues, and fixes — P1xxx connection, P2xxx query, P3xxx migration errors
info: Prisma uses structured error codes organized by category: P1xxx for connection/authentication errors, P2xxx for query engine errors, P3xxx for migration errors, and P4xxx for introspection errors. Each error includes a code, message, and often metadata about the failing field or constraint. The most commonly encountered errors are P2002 (unique constraint violation), P2025 (record not found), P2024 (connection pool timeout), P1001 (can't reach database), and P3006 (shadow database failure). This node provides the complete error reference and resolution steps. See [[prisma/client]] for error handling patterns and [[prisma/migrate]] for migration recovery.

sections.title: Connection errors (P1xxx)
sections.body: P1000 (bad credentials), P1001 (unreachable server), P1002 (timeout), P1003 (database doesn't exist), P1012 (schema validation), P1013 (invalid connection string). Fix by verifying `DATABASE_URL`, checking that the database server is running, and testing connectivity with `psql` or `mysql` directly.

sections.title: Query errors (P2xxx)
sections.body: P2002 (unique constraint — use upsert or catch), P2025 (record not found — check where clause), P2024 (pool timeout — increase connection_limit), P2003 (FK constraint — create parent first), P2021/P2022 (table/column missing — run migrate dev), P2034 (write conflict — retry transaction).

sections.title: Migration errors (P3xxx)
sections.body: P3006/P3014 (shadow database — grant CREATEDB or use db push), P3001 (destructive change — review with --create-only), P3008 (already applied — use migrate resolve), P3009 (blocked by failed — resolve first), P3019 (provider mismatch — update migration_lock.toml).

sections.title: Error handling pattern
sections.body: Import `Prisma` from `@prisma/client` and use `instanceof` checks: `PrismaClientKnownRequestError` (has `.code` and `.meta`), `PrismaClientValidationError` (invalid query shape), `PrismaClientInitializationError` (connection issues). Switch on `.code` for specific handling (P2002 → duplicate, P2025 → not found).

sections.title: Debugging tips
sections.body: Enable query logging with `log: ['query']` in PrismaClient constructor. Use `$on('query')` for event-based logging with duration. Validate schema with `npx prisma validate`. Check migration status with `npx prisma migrate status`. Test connectivity with `npx prisma db execute --stdin <<< "SELECT 1"`.

related.note: Client error handling patterns for P2xxx codes

author: dojo-community
